title: Numismatic Overhaul Reforged Again
description: Terraria style currency in Minecraft. 1.20.1 Forge port of Numismatic Overhaul
body:
This is a fork of the [original forge port](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/numismatic-overhaul-reforged) of [Numismatic Overhaul.](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/numismatic-overhaul)  REPORT ALL BUGS FROM THIS MOD TO THIS MOD'S GITHUB ISSUE. THIS MOD IS NOT AFFILIATED AT ALL WITH THE ORIGINAL FORGE PORT NOR THE ORIGINAL FABRIC VERSION. Please be sure to also recognize that this mod was made by commission and thus won't have the same levels of maintenance as some of my other mods. **ALL FEATURES ARE FROM THE NOVEMBER 22ND 2022 BUILD OF NUMISMATIC OVERHAUL. NO FEATURE PORTS ARE PLANNED.** # ![](https://i.imgur.com/WRgQ7AU.png)  

Numismatic Overhaul adds a currency system to Minecraft, not too dissimilar to how Terraria does it. You have a purse in your Inventory which holds your riches - these may be obtained from killing Pillagers, exploring structures like Bastions, Strongholds, Dungeons, Pillager Outposts, Buried Treasures, Dungeons, Desert Pyramids, and Abandoned Mineshafts, and of course trading with Villagers.

 

![](https://i.imgur.com/eaZwQtf.png)

Speaking of Villagers, these have also been completely reworked. First of all, they obviously trade Currency instead of Emeralds. However, their trades have also been rebalanced and tweaked to provide a more interesting trading experience

![](https://i.imgur.com/7wDkasS.png)

One last feature is the **Shop**, which serves as an easy way to trade items between players. When opened, it displays a Villager GUI with trades the owner can configure. When someone buys something, the money will be stored within and can be retrieved by the owner.
